titleStmt.title: SII 20.46: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 46. (B.K. No. 110 of 1938-39.) GUḌIGĒRI, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall of the store-room in the Jaina basadi.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 994, Paushya, śu. 11, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkrānti corresponding regularly to A.D. 1072, December 24.

The inscription records the revival of the endowment of the village Guḍigeṛe, formerly made by Kuṁkumamahādēvi, the younger sister of the Chālukya king Vijayāditya, to Ānesejjeya-basadī which was caused to be constructed by her a Puligere. The gift is stated to have been made by queen Kaṁchalamahādēvi who was governing from the headquarters at Muḷugunda and others in the presence of the king, with the consent of Bhāskara-bhaṭṭōpādhyāya on the occasion of his victorious return from the northern expedition. It is also stated that Mahāpradhāna Daṇḍanāyaka Rudrabhaṭṭōpadhyāya was administering Guḍigeṛe and Daṇḍanāyaka Īśvarabhaṭṭa was in charge of all the departments. The donee was Nandi-paṇḍitadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīra syādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ jīyāttraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . © namassiddhēbhyaḥ ©
bhadraṁ bhūyātājjinēndrāṇāṁ śāsanāyāghanāśinē kutīrtthadhvāntasaṁghātaprabhinna ghanabhānavē . ©
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvivallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraparamabhaṭā rakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi
pravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . vṛtta . Aṁgavarāḷasiṁgaḷika gūrjjaramāḷavacērapāṁḍyakaḷiṁga
khasāndhrayādavamahībhujamauḷimaṇibrajaprabhāliṁgitapādapīṭhanamarēndraviḷāsanavāryya
vīryyanuttuṁgayaśaṁ samastabhuvanāśrayanāhavamallanandana . lakṣmīrvvakṣasi bhāratī ca vadanē kīrtti
śca gaurīpriyā dṛśyaṁtē bhuvanaikamalla bhavataḥ tiśrōpi dēbyō yataḥ tanmanyē puruṣōttamāṁbujabhavaḥ
svētāṁśu cihnērcchivānēkībhūya vinirmmitastribhuvanavyāpārabhārakṣamaḥ . Ā bhuvanaikamalladēvara ma
nōnayanavallabheyappa śrīmat kaṁcalamahādēviyara mahimōnnatikeye doretene . svastyanavarataparamakalyāṇābhyu
dayasahaśrachaḷabhōgabhāgini nittyapravarttita dayadānadharmmōdyōgini patibratācaraṇaguṇasāvitri pa
rivāracarasamuddharaṇadhātri śriṁgāravidyādhari . sakaḷakaḷādhari . yanavaratasutārahāra variṣōrā
yakandarppahṛdayahariṣōtkariṣe . rāyadāmōdarānurāgapratyakṣa yauvanavanavasantalakṣmi sau
bhāgyanidhānadīpavartti . sakaḷadigantarapravarttitakīrtti . yantaṟpuracūḍāmaṇi vandibrindānandacintāmaṇi .
rūpalāvaṇyaviḷāsavibhramōdbhāsi . śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvaviśāḷavakṣasthaḷanivāsiniyarappa śrīmatpiriyarasi kaṁcala
mahādēviyarmmuḷugundada nelevīḍinoḷ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamiḻdu . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhā
raṇamōnānuṣṭhāna japasamādhi śīḷasaṁppannarvvidagdhavidvajjanapārijātaṣaṭtarkkakumudinīvikaśanasudhādīdhitimīmāṁsamāna
sasarōvararājahaṁsarssakaḷasadācāraparipāḷanaikarasikarbbaṁdhucintāmaṇi samāśritajanakaḷpavṛkṣarnnāmādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ .
śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvarārādhyarappa śrīmadayyagaḷmahāpradhānaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ rudrabhaṭṭōpādhyāyar cakravartti
ya dayeyiṁ dēvabhōgaṁ guḍigeṟiyanāḷuttamire . svasti samadhigatapañcamahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati ma
hāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ . vibudhahṛdayānandapradāyakaṁ . patihitavainatēyaṁ . śaucāṁjanēyaṁ . durjjanabha
yakaraṁ . śaṁkarakiṁkaraṁ nāmādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmaddaṇḍanāyakarīśvarabhaṭṭargge śrīmadbhuvavaikamalladēvara da
yeyiṁ samanta viṣayādhikāradoḷu naḍeyuttamire . svasti samastabhuvanavaḷayaniḷayaniratiśaya kēvaḷa
jñānanētra tritīya virājamāna bhagavadarhatsarvvajña vītarāga paramēśvara mukhakamaḷavinirgga
tādhika sadasadādivasusvarūpanirūpaṇapravīṇasiddhāntādisamastaśāstrāmṛta pārāvārapāragarumanēka
nṛpatimakuṭataṭaghaṭitamaṇigaṇakiraṇajaḷadhārādhautāvadātapūtacaraṇāravindaruṁ budhajanavanaṟpunādhīta
dhīravanamārtaṇḍaruṁ ṣaṭtarkkaṣaṇmukharu paramatatapatvaraṇanirataru paravādīśarabhabhē ruṇḍāparanāma
dhēyarappa śrīmat śrīnandipaṇḍitadēvargge sakavarṣa 994 neya paridhāvisaṁvatsarada sauṣya suddha dvādasi
sōmavāramuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntiyandu . svasti śrīmat piriyarasi kaṁcala mahādēviyara samīpa
dal śrīmadayya daṇḍanāyaka rudrabhaṭṭōpādhyāyarumīśvaradaṇḍanāyakarmmodalāgi sa
mastapradhānavellarumire . vasumati sākṣi dhīratege vāksati sākṣi nṛtakke digvadhūp�sarame sākṣi kīrtige ripubraje maṇḍaḷameyde sākṣi
sāhasake nijāsi sākṣigaḷa vīraguṇakkene matta peṁpigennesakameneyde bittariparārggaḷa bhāskaradaṇḍanāthanaṁ . Aṁtenisida . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśa
bdamahāsāmaṁtādhipatimahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ vibudhavaradāyakaṁ satyaratnākaraṁ vipradivākaraṁ nītipārāya
ṇaṁ sauryyanārāyaṇaṁ vāṇarāyapramukhānēkacōḷasāmaṁtakarikaḷabhakaṁṭhīravaṁ raṇaraṁgabhairavanubhayabaḷasubhaṭakīrttitapratā
paṁ vairisaṁtāpaṁ pārvatīvallabhacaraṇasarasīruhabhṛṁgaṁ mahāmahimōttuṁgaṁ nāmādi samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvarārā
dhyarappa śrīmadayyaṁgaḷ maneverggaḍe daṇḍanāyaka bhāskarabhaṭṭōpādhyāya lāḷamāḷavasaurāṣṭragauḍaviṣayaṁ modalāgiyuttaradiśāvara
darasumakkaḷellarumaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvara śrīpādārādhanadīkṣeya kaikoḷdise rājyalakṣmiyaṁ tarbbante nastuvāhanabhaṁḍāramaṁ kap�maṁ koṁḍu bandu cakravartti
ya muṁdiḍaloḍaṁ karakamaḷamukuḷayuta kuntaḷanāḍa kuntaḷanāthanaṁ paramāśīrvvādanagaḷindaṁ . kuḷḷirddaṁdu śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvara śrīmatkaṁcalamahā
dēviyaru śrīmatpiriyayyaṁgaḷ modalāgi samasta pradhānaruṁ muṁnaṁ puligereyalu cāḷukyacakravarti vijayādityavallabhānujeyappa
kuṁkumamahādēvi māḍisidānesejjeya basadige tāṁbraśāsanamaryyādeyiṁdāḷda guḍigeṟeya kammatavaḷagāgiyiṟe volanuḷḷanitumaninniliṁ
mēreyammadharmamāgi ghanarddattimāḍi śrīnandipaṇḍitadēvargge hastōdakaṁ geydu koṭṭevā grāmamaṁ nimmagāḷkeyidda kāraṇadiṁ nīvuṁ hastōdakaṁgeydudane bhāskara
bhaṭṭa daṇḍanāyakaṁ tadastuveṁdu śrīnandipaṇḍitargge hastōdakaṁ māḍi biṭṭarī dharmamanāvanōrvvaṁ pratipāḷisidātaṁge vāṇarāsiyalu kurukṣētradaluṁ sūryya
grahaṇadaluṁ sāsirakavileyanaḷaṁkārasahitaṁ caturvvēdapāragarappa sāsirvvaru brāhmaṇarggaṁ dānaṁgoṭṭa phaḷamakkuvī dharmamanāvanōrvvanaḷiyalu
mēnandātanā puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷalā kavileyumanā brāhmaṇarumanaḷida mahāpātakanakkuṁ . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhissagarādi
bhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundarā ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 20.46 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
